and/or Acquired Immunodeficiency Syndrome (HIV/AIDS) First Ever Occurrence Date - Medicare Only Claims date - MM/DD/YYYY
HIVAIDS_COMBINED Human Immunodeficiency Virus and/or Acquired Immunodeficiency Syndrome (HIV/AIDS) - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
HIVAIDS_MEDICAID Human Immunodeficiency Virus and/or Acquired Immunodeficiency Syndrome (HIV/AIDS) - Medicaid Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS
